“主播，今天能回本吗？”
“回本？今天我要让老板倒贴！”
陈浪获得垂钓系统，从此走上了一条让所有钓场老板闻风丧胆的不归路。
别人钓鱼费烟，他钓鱼费老板。
别人空军是常态，他爆护是基操。
当陈浪再一次拖着几百斤的鱼获站在秤前时，黑坑老板看着空荡荡的鱼塘，终于忍不住流下了悔恨的泪水。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/5e88d1a458bb23e6c015a9f375a49d8f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"矢去的国王","author_id":"","book_id":"7577007243711761432","book_name":"让你钓鱼，你把老板钓哭了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403840","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":509,"name":"游戏主播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=509&name=游戏主播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7577035764781810238","read_count":"13","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"203070"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"69","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,都市异能,体育,系统,钓鱼,游戏主播","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5e88d1a458bb23e6c015a9f375a49d8f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312603&x-signature=jpKkySYlq0EmElQWjr8qMNxDNGI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"70160609754","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"81"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322053003F3BF27366C973BA8
